sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78187" key="paraklausi/quron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρακλαυσίθῠρον</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n78187.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lover's complaint sung at his mistress's door, serenade</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.753b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
